Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Titan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Titan is a being whose whims lives depend on.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Titan is a being that Ruby can feel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Titan is heading east and could wake up within a week.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Titan is near the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Jai Long wants to put distance between them and the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Titan is a reason for the Akura clan to leave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The approach of a Titan is a significant event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Titan is potentially moving to kill everyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — The Titan is an entity that Yerin needs help to stop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — The Titan is a being Northstrider does not wish to take his gaze from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon wonders if the Titan is in the Heaven's Glory passageway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Titan is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Titan possesses golden power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Akura Malice was pushing the Titan away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Titan was standing outside the ruins of Mount Venture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Titan is a threat that Lindon considers stalling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon intends to use his advancement to help against the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Titan's body has cracks in its shell and crags all over it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Titan's arm was pushed slightly by the Hollow King's Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — A ball of stone and chaos formed in the Titan's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — A wave of yellow earth madra pulsed out from the Titan's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon ran across the Titan's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — A Titan is a threat that Mercy and others must face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Titan's foot is coming down.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel requests to be connected to the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Titan is a being whose location is taken into account by the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — A Titan was going to wake up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The Titan's attack may have caused changes in the power source of the suppression field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — The suppression field may have decayed naturally due to damage from the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Titan is made of stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Titan uses a molten shield to block void-beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Gadrael is the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The barrier on Cradle holds with the defense of the Titan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Titan is considered the least intelligent of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Titan has blazing yellow eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Titan's spiritual pressure can slow the flow of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Titan possesses hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Titan displaced people in the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Titan can travel through space to arrive directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Titan created a void portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King figured out how to swap places with the Titan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Titan stomps a foot down on Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon had to hold off the Titan with nine flying swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Kiuran identifies himself as a one-star Titan.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Titan is one of the common aptitudes for ascendants from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Titans feel a particular claim over Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Cirian identifies as being of the Titans.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
